title: お勉強させてもらいます♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: One, two! ♪ One, two! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, per her request, I join Curren Chan at her
dance practice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Suddenly, the door slams open.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Good mooorning! ☆ Another day, another
spirited dance from yours tru—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Curren?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow, hiii! ♪ Are you and Flash gonna practice
too?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'm accompanying her today. She's arrived
precisely five seconds late, however.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Falcon? Why are you standing near the entrance?
I do not think we can afford to lose any more
time.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, sorry... Uh, you see... I didn't think Curren
would be here...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Aw, do you not want me here?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's not what I mean! It's just that when you're
here...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: It lights a fire in my heart!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: How wonderful.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. It really is. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hm... So Falco's fired up for practice... and Flash
is accompanying her...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ehe, that settles it! ♪ I'm gonna watch your super
sharp dancing up close and personal, Falco!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I bet if I dance with you two, I can sharpen up my
movements too. ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
So, can I practice with y—no, just watching would
even be okay. Can I? Pweeeaaase?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fwoosh!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That stance! She's ready to instantly grasp
everything we do and apply it to her own
learning!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: You truly are a frightening one, Curren.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Falcon, we need to start practicing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On that note, I say...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Pretty pleeease, Falco! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
All right, have it your way! Get ready to dance
your behind off, Curren Chan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Curren Chan continues to dance, and
dance, and dance...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Straight to your heart, I send my love for you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Sha-shing! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
...Wow, Curren. You're amazing. I didn't expect
you to grasp so much so quickly...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, that means a lot coming from youuu!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: What about you, Big Bro? What did you think? ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: What about you, Big Sis? What did you think? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan's dancing is sharper than ever
before!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, let's! After all, you can still learn a lot from
watching.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's helpful to understand other people's
perspective and way of thinking and stuff. ♪

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Falcon, your arm is three degrees too low.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Awww, c'mon, Flash! You're too strict!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That may be the case, but you were the one who
asked me to accompany you. Now your rhythm is
0.5 seconds off.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow! Flash is checking all the ins and outs!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I see... I think I got it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Curren Chan has managed to learn
something from observing Eishin Flash.
